variants: As a member of the Juniper Maskmakers Collective, Ava Corvello utilizes her expertise in cultural anthropology to delve into the nuances of artistic expression. In addition to her scholarly achievements, she holds a professional certification in the form of a Drift Architect Approval. Her contributions to anthropology and the collective have made her a notable figure in her community.

With her Drift Architect Approval, she has set herself apart as an expert in her field.
